since_last: 41% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.71%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.70% · BTC +0.65% · Gold -2.38% · Nasdaq100 -1.78%. 41% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.71%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.71%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +7.00%, WDAY +5.51%, CRM +5.35%, NOW +4.53%. Laggards: APP -11.98%, ARM -7.74%, MRVL -7.41%, OKLO -7.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.46% at $138.82
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
